identity.name: The Financial Architect
identity.description: A precision-engineered interface for project management. Minimalist, data-dense, and strictly professional. It avoids decoration in favor of clarity.

usage_rules: Use Inter for all body text, inputs, and labels.
Use JetBrains Mono for all currency values, dates, and IDs.
Never center text unless it is a standalone hero statement.
Primary color is ONLY for the main Call-to-Action (CTA) on a page.
Use Slate/Grey for secondary actions to reduce visual noise.
Backgrounds should be stark white (light mode) or deep slate (dark mode).
Borders should be subtle: border-slate-200 (light) or border-slate-800 (dark).
Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid colors.

rules: Dashboard widgets must fill their grid cells completely (h-full).
Use a sidebar navigation for desktop, drawer for mobile.
Forms should be single-column for focus, max-width-md.
Tables should use full width with sticky headers.

cards.classes: rounded-md border border-border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-all
buttons.secondary: rounded-full bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-all

inputs.classes: rounded-md border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

visual_enhancers.shadows: shadow-sm for cards, shadow-lg for dropdowns/modals.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid borders are preferred over shadows for separation.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use sparingly. Only for sticky headers: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-slate-200/50.

rules: Hover effects should be subtle (slight color shift or shadow increase).
Page transitions should be a quick fade-in (opacity-0 to opacity-100).

assets.icons: Lucide React (default). Use thin strokes (stroke-width={1.5}) for elegance.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 'Control Room' grid for the main dashboard.
Use the specified color palette strictly. Do not introduce new colors.
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast (WCAG AA).
Use 'Manrope' font for all headings. Import it from Google Fonts.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all financial data (budgets, expenses).
Customize Shadcn components to match the 'Sharp/Minimal' aesthetic defined in components section.
Use the provided image URLs for mock data and placeholders.
Ensure the app is fully responsive (mobile-first approach).
Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements.
universal_guidelines: Create depth through z-index and subtle borders.
Do not use 'transition: all'. Animate specific properties.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
Every interaction needs a micro-state (hover, focus, active).
